zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Dodscombe於1375年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親John Dodscombe26歲，母親Margaret Cecelia Corneu25歲。她於1390年與Nicholas Tremayne在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1448年在英國戴文享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Dodscombe于1375年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲John Dodscombe26岁，母亲Margaret Cecelia Corneu25岁。她于1390年与Nicholas Tremayne在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1448年在英国戴文享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Dodscombe was born in 1375, in Cornwall, England, her father, John Dodscombe, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Cecelia Corneu, was 25. She married Nicholas Tremayne in 1390, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1448, in Devon, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Dodscombe est née en 1375, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, John Dodscombe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cecelia Corneu, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Tremayne en 1390, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1448, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Dodscombe 1375 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Dodscombe 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Cecelia Corneu 25. Sie hat 1390 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Tremayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1448 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dodscombe è nata il nel 1375 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, John Dodscombe, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Cecelia Corneu, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Tremayne nel 1390, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1448, nel Devon, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Dodscombeが1375年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父John Dodscombeは26歳，母Margaret Cecelia Corneuは25歳であった。1390年にイギリスイギリスデボンでNicholas Tremayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1448年にイギリスデボンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dodscombe(이)가 1375년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Dodscombe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cecelia Corneu(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Nicholas Tremayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 데폰에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Dodscombe nasceu em 1375, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Dodscombe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cecelia Corneu, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Tremayne em 1390, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1448, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Dodscombe родилась в 1375 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени John Dodscombe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cecelia Corneu, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Tremayne в 1390 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1448 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Dodscombe nació en 1375, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, John Dodscombe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Cecelia Corneu, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Nicholas Tremayne en 1390, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1448, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
